flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Warren County Career Center fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Warren County Career Center rose 60% between 2021 and 2024 (164 → 263).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Warren County Career Center rose 54% between 2006 and 2009 (56.0% → 86.2%).

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Warren County Career Center are 21% above the public certificate-predominant peer median ($49.0k vs $40.5k).
